nodes.contents: Calc(select=[transaction_id, store_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price, (quantity * unit_price) AS total_amount, transaction_time])

LookupJoin(table=[dim_products], async=[true], asyncCapacity=[200], cache=[LRU(size=50000, ttl=300000)], lookup=[product_id], select=[transaction_id, store_id, product_id, quantity, total_amount, transaction_time, product_name, category, brand])

LookupJoin(table=[dim_stores], async=[true], asyncCapacity=[100], cache=[LRU(size=10000, ttl=600000)], lookup=[store_id], select=[transaction_id, store_id, product_id, quantity, total_amount, transaction_time, product_name, category, brand, store_name, region, city])

WindowAggregate(window=[TUMBLE(transaction_time, INTERVAL '1' MINUTE)], groupBy=[region, category], select=[region, category, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue, SUM(quantity) AS units_sold, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, window_start, window_end])

Rank(partitionBy=[window_start, region], orderBy=[revenue DESC], rankType=[ROW_NUMBER], select=[region, category, revenue, units_sold, transaction_count, window_start, window_end, rank_num], rankRange=[1, 10])
Calc(select=[region, category, revenue, units_sold, transaction_count, window_start, window_end, rank_num], where=[rank_num <= 5])
